ham.subject: Critical Security Patch Deployment – 12:00 UTC
ham.body:
Dear Engineering Team,

Our security team has identified a high‑severity vulnerability in the OpenSSL library used across several microservices. A critical patch is scheduled for automatic deployment at 12:00 UTC. The script will restart affected services; please double‑check custom configurations in your CI pipelines to avoid interference.

What you need to do:

1. Verify that you have a recent backup of your Docker images.
2. Ensure your ECS task definitions reference the latest base image.
3. If you have custom sidecar containers, confirm they are compatible with the new OpenSSL version.

The patch will complete in approximately 45 minutes. Services should remain unavailable for 30–45 minutes during restart.

If you encounter any errors or service disruptions, please open a ticket in the IT Service Portal and attach relevant logs.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
Alex Martinez
Senior Systems Engineer

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Cloud Account Will Be Disabled in 24 Hours
spam.body:
Dear Cloud User,

We have detected unusual activity on your account (ID: 3f9b1c7e-4d2a-11ee-8c97-0242ac110003). In accordance with our security policy, we have temporarily suspended your access to avoid potential data loss.

To restore full service, you must verify your account information immediately. Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in permanent deletion of all associated data.

Please click the link below and log in with your usual credentials to confirm:

<URL>

If you believe this suspension is mistaken, contact us immediately at support@cloudservices.com.

Thank you for your quick attention to this critical matter.

Regards,
Cloud Security Team
